atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right knee pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a right knee injury sustained from a trampoline fall four days ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a popping sensation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports subsequent swelling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports some pain with weight-bearing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports tolerance of some weight.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty checking his blood sugar levels frequently.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports that his diet has been good lately.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The right knee demonstrates significant swelling.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Pain is elicited with palpation on the medial aspect of the knee.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Limited range of motion is noted with pain on flexion and extension.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The McBurney's test is negative.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Heart and lung sounds are clear.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Vital signs are within normal limits.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes Mobic for pain relief.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refills metformin 500 mg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician instructs the patient to ice the knee for 15 minutes every hour.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders an MRI of the right knee to evaluate for ligamentous injury.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician orders a hemoglobin A1c to assess diabetes control.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician schedules a follow-up appointment in two weeks to assess progress and MRI results.
